LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BRANDEN BICKEL'S RE-NOTICED MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR PER SEPTEMBER 12, 2013 EX PARTE ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ORIENTAL WAREHOUSE OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISMISSING FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND ALL CLAIMS ASSERTED THEREIN, WITH PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. THE COURT VACATES THE VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL ENTERED ON NOVEMBER 5, 2013, THAT DISMISSED THE DOE DEFENDANTS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THE ENTIRE ACTION BY DECEMBER 20, 2013, TO CONFORM TO THE CCP 998 SETTLEMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Dismissing First Amended Complaint And All Claims Asserted Therein, With Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ORIENTAL WAREHOUSE OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Order Dismissing First Amended Complaint And All Claims Asserted Therein, With Prejudice is granted. The Court vacates the voluntary dismissal entered on November 5, 2013, that dismissed the Doe defendants without prejudice. The Court orders plaintiff to file a dismissal with prejudice as to the entire action by December 20, 2013, to conform to the CCP 998 settlement. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332

Re-Notice Of Motion For An Order Granting Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BRANDEN BICKEL'S Re-Noticed Motion For An Order Granting Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is off calendar per September 12, 2013 ex parte order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
